steps.title: Identify the claim that will be challenged
steps.content: The underlined text asserts that Medellín's style is “so idiosyncratic that it resists efforts to view his work through the lens of nationality or cultural identity.” To challenge this, a critic must show the work actually invites such classification.

steps.title: Find the quotation inviting classification
steps.content: Choice D directly states the work “invites classification as Indigenous art,” the exact cultural identity framing the original claim insists the work resists. The other choices either identify influences without claiming the work invites classification, describe the synthesis without addressing framing, or discuss which influences critics emphasize. This matches choice D — D is correct.
